description: Hamnix package repository — JSON index + tarballs, GitHub Pages-hosted at 255.one. v1 packages: hamnix-base, hamnix-bootloader, hamnix-installer-tools, linux-debian-12. See README.md for the package format.

packages.name: hamnix-hello
packages.description: Minimal example package — proves the hpm install pipeline works

packages.name: hamnix-base
packages.description: Hamnix base userland — init, hamsh, services, framework .kos

packages.name: hamnix-bootloader
packages.description: Hamnix UEFI bootloader stub + kernel ELF (installs onto the ESP)

packages.name: hamnix-installer-tools
packages.description: Hamnix installer tools — partitioner, mkfs, dd_blk, hpm

packages.name: linux-debian-12
packages.description: Debian 12 (bookworm) rootfs for the Linux namespace
